title: NEBNext® ARTIC SARS-CoV-2 Library Prep - Bead Cleanup
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol produces a cleanup as part of the NEBNext kit. For detailed protocol steps, please see below.
steps_raw: This protocol produces a cleanup as part of the NEBNext kit. For detailed protocol steps, please see below.
Transfer sample from plate on slot 2 to plate on slot 3.
Pause. Put fresh plate on slot 2.
materials_raw: NEST 96 Well Plate 100 µL PCR Full Skirt #402501
